posts.title: Why Your Morning Coffee Might Be Sabotaging Your Sleep
posts.excerpt: You finish your last cup at 2 PM. So why are you still wired at 11 PM? The answer lies in caffeine's true half-life.

posts.title: The 5 AM Advantage: How to Build a Morning Routine for Peak Performance
posts.excerpt: Discover how to create a science-backed morning routine that boosts energy, focus, and productivity without burnout. Practical steps for high achievers who want sustainable success.

posts.title: Digital Boundaries: How to Use Technology Without Letting It Use You
posts.excerpt: Learn how to create mindful technology boundaries that protect your attention, reduce anxiety, and help you reconnect with what matters most in a distracted world.

posts.title: The Sustainable Wellness Habits Nobody Talks About
posts.excerpt: Most wellness advice focuses on what to add. The real secrets are what to subtract. Learn the counterintuitive habits that create lasting health without constant willpower.
